parents.subject: LU-13814 osc: Remove usage of cdp_cl_pages

commit.subject: LU-13814 clio: add osc pages array
commit.message:
LU-13814 clio: add osc pages array

This OSC pages array will replace the cl_page array used in
the DIO code.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Test-Parameters: forjanitoronly
Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I5e2314d33bf01e6684a1626adc31ef925e0594ce
